Id1.text: Buzz Aldrin, also called Edwin E. Aldrin Jr., graduated in 1963 from MIT with a Sc.D. and was a crew member on Apollo 11.

Id2.text: Buzz Aldrin, whose real name was Edwin E. Aldrin, Jr., graduated from Massachusetts Institute of Technology in 1963 with a doctorate in Science and later became a crew member of Apollo 11.
